name: Strawberry Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: A few drops red food coloring
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------CREAM FILLING-------------------------------
1/2 cup sugar
3 tablespoons cornstarch
3 tablespoons enriched flour
1/2 teaspoon salt
2 cups milk
1 slightly beaten egg
1/2 cup whipped heavy cream
1 teaspoon vanilla
Combine the first four ingredients. Gradually stir in milk. Stirring constantly, bring to a boil; reduce heat and cook, stirring until thick. Stir a little of the hot mixture into the egg; return to the remaining hot mixture. Bring just to boiling, stirring constantly. Cool, then chill. Beat well; fold in whipped cream and vanilla.
Directions for pie:
Toast almonds until lightly browned, then sprinkle over the bottom of the cooled pie crust. Fill the crust with chilled Cream Filling. Halve 2 cups of the strawberries. Pile atop filling.
Glaze:
Crush remaining 1/2 cup berries; add water; cook 2 minutes; sieve. Mix sugar and cornstarch; gradually stir in berry juice. Cook, stirring until thick and clear. Tint to desired color with food coloring. Cool slightly; pour over halved strawberries. Keep refrigerated until serving time. Pass whipped cream, if desired.
